compiled_state.title: Agents attempt to close bug tickets without --reason flag, causing silent failures
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Bug tickets require --reason with prefix 'Fixed:' or 'Escalated to user:' when transitioning to closed. Agents currently attempt bare transitions (ticket transition <id> in_progress closed) which fail silently. Fix: update CLAUDE.md ticket transition guidance, fix-bug SKILL.md Step 8, and end-session SKILL.md Step 2 to include the --reason flag with the required prefix. Also consider updating the error message from the ticket system to be more prominent.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Root cause confirmed: ticket transition to closed for bug type requires --reason flag but CLAUDE.md, fix-bug SKILL.md, and end-session SKILL.md omit it.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
